CustomField.description: Picklist used to identify the RAG level of a property.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Red: major issues - poses immediate health and safety risks Amber-Red: major issues - will affect measure performance Amber: minor issues - may affect measure performance Amber-Green: minor issues - will not materially affect measure performance Green: no issues - passes inspection standards N/A: cancelled/discontinued
CustomField.label: Property RAG
